--- Warforged — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+1=13 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Cult Fanatic awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Cult Fanatic.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.

REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:17+3=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 8casting_mod force damage. Warforged — Armored Tank HP: NaN/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Warforged — Armored Tank.
→ Warforged — Armored Tank: DEX save [d20:18+7=25 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
